headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of EMCOR (EME)
summary: EMCOR has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 7.7% to $757.07 per share while the index has gained 7.7%.
